{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Elysia gates
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The gates of [[Elysia]] feature a silver-set [[emerald]] the size of [[Rhalia]]'s head.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c8">''House of Blades'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
